case_title: JOEL NEWMAN VS. EURO MOTORS, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEWMAN, JOEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EURO MOTORS, INC. SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-23-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JOEL NEWMAN IS PRESENT. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2019 - JUDGMENT.
